name: spec-workflow
description: Spec-driven workflow for design docs, reviews, and tmux-based multi-agent handoffs.

interface.shortDescription: Design, dispatch, review, and feedback skills for structured agent collaboration.
interface.longDescription: A spec-driven workflow plugin that turns design discussions into documents, dispatches work across tmux panes, reviews implementations, and closes the feedback loop.
defaultPrompt: Use spec-workflow:spec-feature to turn this requirement discussion into a design doc.
Use spec-workflow:spec-implement to send this design doc to another tmux pane.
Use spec-workflow:spec-review to compare the implementation against the design.
